text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the day of the Spring Stakes, Rice Shower
worries she won't be able to catch up to Mihono
Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, her life as a racer has just begun. With
her feelings in check, she heads out to test her
abilities in her first real race.
